summary: Comprehensive testing of Cognitive Offloading Research Tool completed. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% test success rate. Frontend UI mostly working with minor modal overlay issue affecting navigation flow.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal backdrop overlay intercepting pointer events preventing navigation clicks after modal operations

passed_tests: Backend experiment CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Backend session workflow (create participant, session, start, notifications, probes, blackout, complete)
Backend task management (create, update, get with filters)
Backend data export functionality (JSON/CSV formats for sessions, tasks, reports)
Frontend page loading and navigation (Overview, Experiments, Simulation, Analytics)
Frontend experiment creation modal and form submission
Frontend analytics page data display and export buttons
Frontend progress tracker page loading and task display
Frontend form validation and data input
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issue where backdrop remains active and blocks navigation clicks after modal operations. The issue specifically affects task creation and potentially other modals. Consider adding proper modal state management to ensure overlays are properly removed when modals close.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% - Most functionality working, modal overlay issue affects navigation flow
